required_outputs: classified finding set with worthwhile versus not-taken judgments
success_predicate: the worker has an explicit bounded fix list tied to real review findings
forbidden_shortcuts: patching speculative issues not grounded in the harvested review
taking a finding that contradicts the controlling lock without escalation

required_outputs: bounded code or doc fixes for the worthwhile findings only
success_predicate: the taken findings are implemented without widening the slice
forbidden_shortcuts: widening the slice under the banner of review response
quietly skipping a taken finding without recording why
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact fix blocker and wait

required_outputs: fresh targeted check results over the touched owned lane
success_predicate: the touched slice lane is green after the review fixes
required_checks: same targeted package lane checks used for implementation readiness, narrowed only if the touched surface is narrower and that narrowing is stated explicitly
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming review fixes are ready without rerunning the touched lane
overclaiming broader checks than were actually rerun
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact failing check and wait

required_outputs: review-fix worker baton naming taken findings, skipped findings, checks run, and readiness judgment
success_predicate: the orchestrator can decide on push/CI without interpretive recovery
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming review-fix completion without the baton
steps.escalate_if_fail: stay on this step until the baton exists
